description: Master catalog of all prompts, templates, and agent definitions in this library. This is the agent entry point — read this file to discover available prompts and select the right one for your task.

usage.for_agents: Filter 'entries' by 'category', 'type', 'tags', 'project_types', or 'agent_capabilities'. Load the file at 'file' to get the full prompt.
usage.for_humans: Browse by category in the prompts/, projects/, and agents/ directories, or search by tag.

categories.coding: Software engineering prompts: code generation, review, debugging, refactoring, testing
categories.writing: Content and documentation prompts: blog posts, technical docs, READMEs, reports
categories.analysis: Research, data analysis, and reasoning prompts
categories.automation: Workflow, script, and pipeline design prompts
categories.agents: System prompts and meta-prompts for configuring AI agents

entries.title: Code Generation
entries.description: Generate well-structured, documented code from a plain-language description
entries.use_when: When you need to create new code from scratch based on a description or requirements

entries.title: Code Review
entries.description: Review code for bugs, security issues, performance problems, and style violations
entries.use_when: When you need a thorough review of existing code before merging or shipping

entries.title: Debugging Assistant
entries.description: Diagnose the root cause of a bug and suggest a fix
entries.use_when: When you have a bug, error, or unexpected behavior and need to identify the root cause and fix

entries.title: Code Refactoring
entries.description: Refactor existing code to improve readability, structure, and maintainability without changing behavior
entries.use_when: When you have working code that needs to be cleaned up, simplified, or restructured

entries.title: Write Tests
entries.description: Generate comprehensive test cases for a function, class, or module
entries.use_when: When you need to write unit, integration, or end-to-end tests for existing or new code

entries.title: Blog Post Writer
entries.description: Write a complete, engaging blog post on any topic
entries.use_when: When you need to produce a full blog post from a topic or outline

entries.title: Technical Documentation Writer
entries.description: Write clear technical documentation for a feature, API, or system
entries.use_when: When you need to create or update technical documentation for developers or technical users

entries.title: README Generator
entries.description: Generate a comprehensive README for any software project
entries.use_when: When you need to create or improve a README for a software project or repository

entries.title: Report and Summary Writer
entries.description: Summarize research, data, or documents into a clear, structured report
entries.use_when: When you need to distill a large body of information into a concise, structured report

entries.title: Data Analysis
entries.description: Analyze a dataset and surface key insights, trends, and anomalies
entries.use_when: When you have a dataset or data description and need to extract meaningful insights

entries.title: Research Summary
entries.description: Summarize research on a topic into a structured briefing with sources
entries.use_when: When you need a comprehensive summary of what is known about a topic

entries.title: Compare Options
entries.description: Systematically compare and evaluate a set of options against defined criteria
entries.use_when: When you need to choose between multiple options and want a structured, objective comparison

entries.title: Root Cause Analysis
entries.description: Perform a structured root cause analysis (RCA) on a problem or incident
entries.use_when: When a problem or incident has occurred and you need to identify the true underlying cause to prevent recurrence

entries.title: Workflow Design
entries.description: Design a complete automated workflow for a business or technical process
entries.use_when: When you need to design a new automated workflow or automate an existing manual process

entries.title: Script Generation
entries.description: Generate a script to automate a repetitive or complex task
entries.use_when: When you need a script to automate a specific task — file processing, API calls, data transformation, system administration

entries.title: Pipeline Architecture
entries.description: Design a data or integration pipeline architecture
entries.use_when: When you need to design a new data pipeline, ETL process, or integration pipeline

entries.title: API Integration
entries.description: Plan and implement an integration between two systems via API
entries.use_when: When you need to connect two systems or services via their APIs

entries.title: Agent System Prompt Template
entries.description: Base template for creating a system prompt for any AI agent
entries.use_when: When you need to create a system prompt to configure an AI agent with a specific role, behavior, and constraints

entries.title: Agent Role Definition
entries.description: Define an agent's role, goals, capabilities, and constraints for a multi-agent system
entries.use_when: When designing a new agent for a multi-agent system and you need to specify its role, boundaries, and interfaces

entries.title: Multi-Agent Coordinator
entries.description: Coordinate tasks across multiple specialized agents in a pipeline or network
entries.use_when: When you are building an orchestrator agent that needs to route tasks to specialist agents and synthesize their outputs

entries.title: Agent Self-Reflection
entries.description: Prompt an agent to evaluate, critique, and improve its own output
entries.use_when: When you want an agent to critically review its own output before delivering it, improving accuracy and quality

entries.title: Brainstorm
entries.description: Generate a wide range of ideas on any topic using structured creative thinking
entries.use_when: When you need to generate many diverse ideas on a topic before narrowing down

entries.title: Project Planning
entries.description: Create a structured project plan from a goal or brief
entries.use_when: When you have a goal or project idea and need a structured plan with milestones, tasks, and timeline

entries.title: Decision Framework
entries.description: Evaluate options systematically and make a well-reasoned decision
entries.use_when: When you face a decision with multiple options and want a structured, bias-aware approach

entries.title: Clarifying Questions Generator
entries.description: Generate the right clarifying questions before starting any task
entries.use_when: When a task or request is ambiguous and you need to gather the right information before starting work

entries.title: Research Agent Definition
entries.description: Complete system prompt and configuration for a general-purpose research agent
entries.use_when: When you need an autonomous agent to research a topic, gather evidence, and produce a synthesized report

entries.title: Coding Agent Definition
entries.description: Complete system prompt and configuration for a general-purpose software engineering agent
entries.use_when: When you need an autonomous agent to write, review, test, or debug code

entries.title: Planning Agent Definition
entries.description: Complete system prompt and configuration for a general-purpose planning and project management agent
entries.use_when: When you need an autonomous agent to break down goals into tasks, create plans, and manage priorities

entries.title: Orchestrator Agent Definition
entries.description: Complete system prompt and configuration for a master orchestrator agent
entries.use_when: When you need an autonomous agent to manage a team of specialist agents and coordinate complex multi-step workflows
